description_long: This is a cylindrical metal can of Campbell's Condensed Soup, specifically the Chicken Noodle variety. The can features a pull-tab lid on top for easy opening and is wrapped in a printed paper label. The front of the label displays the Campbell's logo in white script on a red background, with a green 'Healthy Request' heart-shaped badge and an image of chicken noodle soup in a bowl. The sides of the can provide nutritional information, preparation instructions, and a close-up image of uncooked noodles. The back of the can is densely covered with text, including a nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, and bilingual instructions. The overall color scheme is red, white, green, and yellow, with metallic silver visible on the top and bottom.
description: A Campbell's Chicken Noodle Soup can with a red and white label, pull-tab lid, and detailed nutritional and preparation information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Campbell's logo, 'Healthy Request' badge, and a bowl of chicken noodle soup.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a close-up image of uncooked noodles and health claims about fat and vitamin content.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the nutrition facts panel, ingredients, and preparation instructions in English and Spanish.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the transition between the front and side, with the pull-tab lid and part of the nutritional label visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The Campbell's logo is visible on the front, written in white cursive script on a red background, occupying the upper portion of the label.
attribute_flavor_indication: The label clearly states 'Chicken Noodle' and shows an image of chicken noodle soup, indicating the flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the can, along with health claims such as 'Low in Saturated Fat & Cholesterol' and 'Good Source of Vitamin A' on the side.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A green heart-shaped 'Healthy Request' badge is present on the front, indicating a health-oriented product line.
